zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Praers於1295年出生在英國爾巴堂姆利時，她的父親William de Praers30歲，母親Sibyl de Crewe25歲。她和Richard Minshull II至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在英國爾邱奇 明書爾。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Praers was born in 1295, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, her father, William de Praers, was 30 and her mother, Sibyl de Crewe, was 25. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Richard Minshull II. She died in Church Minshull, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Praers est née en 1295, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Praers, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sibyl de Crewe, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Richard Minshull II. Elle est décédée à Church Minshull, Cheshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Praers è nata il nel 1295 nel Barthomley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, William de Praers, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Sibyl de Crewe, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Richard Minshull II. Morì nel Church Minshull, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Praersが1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで生まれた時，父William de Praersは30歳，母Sibyl de Creweは25歳であった。彼女はRichard Minshull IIとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はイギリスチェシュアイアチャーチ ミンシュルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Praers(이)가 1295년 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Praers(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl de Crewe(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Richard Minshull II(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 체실르 c후르치 민슈에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Praers родилась в 1295 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Praers было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl de Crewe, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Richard Minshull II. Она умерла в местности чурч миншулл, чешир, Англия.
